title: Rock and Block
description: Rock and Block adds new stone blocks to the caves of the world, which are used for decoration and building
body: Rock and Block currently adds 7 new stone blocks to the game. These blocks are like diorite, granite, and andesite, having stair, slab, wall, and polished variants. They generate around the world, specific to locations and biomes. These new blocks are here to add spice and decor to your builds.
